hooks.command: cd /Users/nilesh/development/PPPipesProducts && FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD | grep -v '^go-backend/ppp-backend' | grep -v '^\.dart_tool' | grep -v '^mobile/\.dart_tool' | grep -v '^mobile/web/' | grep -v '^go-backend/ppp-backend-new') && if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | xargs git add && git commit -m 'chore: auto-commit session changes' && git push origin main && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Session changes committed and pushed to git"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ No uncommitted changes"}'; fi
